name: pm-guidelines
description: Cross-project PM best practices enforcement — 504 guidelines, 14 skills, 6 agents, 8 hooks (7 quality checks in single dispatcher). Covers status labels, bilingual parity, dashboard quality, cross-tab reconciliation, link integrity, context-boundary scrub, MD/HTML parity, data-readiness gate, DevOps integration, HTML infrastructure, modal accessibility, print CSS, title consistency, session discipline, estimation, consolidation, and standalone updates. v1.7.0 adds the pm-data-readiness skill (probe-before-publish workflow for live data claims) and the pm-link-auditor agent (post-hoc hyperlink integrity audit — companion to the pm-link-integrity skill).
